memoryArtifacts.headline: JOSSELYN FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
memoryArtifacts.description:
JOHN JOSSELYN was born about 1451 of Essex, England, to Geoffrey Josselyn (1424-1471) and Katherine LeGraye (1428-1478.)  He married Jeanne Lavenham, about 1472, of Great Canfield, Essex, England.

Jo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffery Josselyn於1367年出生在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，他的父親Ralph Josselyn28歲，母親Margaret Patner28歲。他於1406年與Katherine在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年在英國享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffery Josselyn于1367年出生在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，他的父亲Ralph Josselyn28岁，母亲Margaret Patner28岁。他于1406年与Katherine在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年在英国享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Josselyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk and Essex): variant of   Joslin  .

History: The Josselyn name appears in Black Point (now Scarborough, ME) before 1638, when the author John Josselyn came to visit his brother Henry, who was for many years a principal representative in eastern New England of the interests of the Mason and Gorges heirs, which were endangered by the Massachusetts Bay colony's expansion into Maine. Their father was Sir Thomas Josselyn, of Torrell's Hall in Willingale, Essex, England.

variants.name: Joslin
meanings: from the Old French personal name Goscelin, Gosselin, Joscelin, from ancient Germanic Goz(e)lin, a diminutive of a short form of compound names based on the element goz (from gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Geat’ or ‘Goth’; see Goss ).
alternatively, perhaps a diminutive of the Old French personal name Josse (Old Breton Judoc); see Joyce .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffery Josselyn was born in 1367, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Ralph Josselyn, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Patner, was 28. He married Katherine in 1406, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1425, in England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffery Josselyn est né en 1367, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Josselyn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Patner, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Katherine en 1406, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1425, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffery Josselyn 1367 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Josselyn 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Patner 28. Er hat 1406 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1425 im Alter von 58 Jahren in England und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffery Josselyn è nato il nel 1367 nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Josselyn, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Patner, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Katherine nel 1406, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1425, nel England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffery Josselynが1367年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父Ralph Josselynは28歳，母Margaret Patnerは28歳であった。1406年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでKatherineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年にイギリスで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffery Josselyn(이)가 1367년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Josselyn(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Patner(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1406년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 Katherine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 영국에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffery Josselyn nasceu em 1367, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Josselyn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Patner, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine em 1406, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1425, em Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffery Josselyn родился в 1367 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Josselyn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Patner, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine в 1406 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1425 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffery Josselyn nació en 1367, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Josselyn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Patner, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Katherine en 1406, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1425, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
